name: Create Fitness Circuit Flipchart
description:
A middle school PE teacher needs a circuit training flipchart. Create a 4-page ActivInspire flipchart saved to /home/ga/Documents/Flipcharts/circuit_training_stations.flipchart with the following content:

Page 1: Title 'Circuit Training: Bodyweight Basics' and safety text 'Warm up before starting'.
Page 2: Exercise 'Jumping Jacks', a green circle (difficulty indicator), text '30 reps', and form cue 'Keep arms fully extended'.
Page 3: Exercise 'Wall Sit', a yellow or orange circle, text '45 seconds', and form cue 'Back flat against the wall'.
Page 4: Exercise 'Push-Ups', a red circle, text '15 reps', and form cue 'Keep your core tight'.
